$comment: Form-framework vibe test battery. CORE tier = headline comparison (all 4 frameworks fully support). STRETCH tier = reported separately (roadmap signal; Formentor scaffold does not yet support). expectedBehaviors is EVAL-ONLY — never shown to tester agents (invariant #3). Prompts are phrased as a naive non-expert would ask (invariant #2/#3).

prompts.prompt: Make a form with a single "Full name" text box and a Save button.
Build a newsletter signup with an email field. It should check that the email looks valid before it can be submitted, and send it to /api/subscribe.
Create a login form with email and password. The password has to be at least 8 characters.
Make a form where the submit button stays disabled until all the required fields are filled in correctly.
Build a sign-up form with a password and a confirm-password field. Show an error if the two don't match.
Make a form to invite a teammate: their email, and a dropdown to pick their role (Admin, Editor, or Viewer).
Add a quantity picker to a form. It should only allow whole numbers from 1 to 99.
Make a form where the user has to tick a box to accept the terms before they can continue.
Build a feedback form with a subject line, a longer message box, and a dropdown to pick how urgent it is (Low, Medium, High).
Make a form to claim a username. When they submit, check with the server whether the name is taken and show an error if it is.
Build a profile settings section: display name (required), a short bio (optional), and a toggle for making the profile public.
Make a profile card that shows the user's name and email as read-only text, with an "Edit" button that turns the same fields into editable inputs.
Build a contact form: name, email, and a message. Email must be valid and the message can't be empty.
Make a simple order form: pick a product from a dropdown and enter how many (at least 1).
Build a password reset form with a new password (at least 8 characters) and a confirmation that must match.
Build an invoice form where the user can add and remove line items, each with a description and an amount.
Make a checkout form that collects a shipping address grouped together (street, city, postal code) inside the larger form.
Build a form with a "Do you have a referral code?" checkbox that reveals a code field only when it's checked.
Create a multi-step signup wizard with Back and Next buttons and a progress indicator across three steps.
Add a city field that suggests matching cities from the server as the user types.
Build a form that lets the user attach a profile photo file along with their name.
